insight_summary: More people are talking about British Flag right now. Lead with a clear opinion before the conversation gets crowded.

next_post.hook: Unpopular opinion: British Flag matters more now than people admit.
next_post.content_idea: Frame it around how british flag is shifting among younger audiences — use one real example from daily British life, then ask viewers which side they are on.
next_post.format: Yes/No debate post with comment-bait question overlay
next_post.reason_it_will_perform_better: This works because it taps into debate, which consistently drives strong engagement with your audience, and uses a debate format they respond to well.
